title: Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope (disambiguation)
content:
Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope may refer to:

==Canon==
===Films===
*{{Film|IV}}, the [[1977]] film in the [[original trilogy]]

===Novels===
*'''''[[A New Hope: The Princess, the Scoundrel, and the Farm Boy]]''''' {{C|[[A New Hope: The Princess, the Scoundrel, and the Farm Boy (audiobook)|audiobook]]}}, a junior novelization
*'''[[Star Wars: A New Hope (paperback novel)|''Star Wars: A New Hope'']]''', an updated [[canon]] release of the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] junior novelization
*'''''[[A New Hope - The Film Novel]]''''', the french junior adaptation from [[Hachette Jeunesse]]

===Young readers===
*'''''[[Star Wars: A New Hope (Disney Die-Cut Classics)]]''''', a young readers adaptation from [[Studio Fun International]]
*''[[Episode IV: A New Hope Read-Along Storybook and CD]]'', an illustrated storybook and accompanied audio CD from Disney–Lucasfilm Press
*'''[[A New Hope (Little Golden Book)|''A New Hope'']]''', young-readers [[2015]] adaptation from [[Golden Books]]
*'''[[A New Hope (French junior novel)|''A New Hope'']]''', the french young reader's adaptation from [[Hachette Jeunesse]]
*'''[[A New Hope (Big Golden Book)|''A New Hope'']]''', young-readers [[2017]] adaptation from Golden Books
*'''[[A New Hope (Epic Adventures)|''A New Hope'']]''', a cancelled illustrated storybook from [[Sandvik Publishing]]
*'''''[[The Rise of a Hero]]''''', a storybook from Disney–Lucasfilm Press

==Legends==
*[[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope'']] (movie novelization)
*''[[Star Wars: Episode IV — A New Hope]]'' (Marvel comic adaptation)
*[[Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope (PhotoComic)|''Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope'']] (photo comic)
*''[[Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition]]'' (Dark Horse comic adaptation focused on the Special Edition of the film)
*[[Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope (junior novelization)|''Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope'']] (Legends junior novelization)
*[[Star Wars: A New Hope (abridged audiobook)|''Star Wars: A New Hope'']] (abridged audiobook)
*''[[Star Wars Manga: A New Hope]]''
*[[Star Wars (radio)|''Star Wars'']] (radio drama)
*[[Star Wars (1987 video game)|''Star Wars'']] (A [[1987]] video game based on events from the original film)
*[[Star Wars (1991 video game)|''Star Wars'']] (A [[1991]] video game based on events from the original film)
*[[Star Wars (book-and-record)|''Star Wars'']] (book-and-record)
*[[A New Hope (book-and-record)|''A New Hope'']] (book-and-record following the release of the Special Edition)
*[[A New Hope (Shimmer Book)|''A New Hope'']] (Shimmer Book adaptation of the story)
*''[[A New Hope Revised Unlimited]]'' (customizable card game)
*[[A New Hope (TCG)|''Star Wars: A New Hope'']] (trading card game)
*[[A New Hope (painting)|''A New Hope'']] (an [[in-universe]] painting)
*''[[Star Wars: Tell-A-Story Sticker Book]]''

==Non-canon adaptations==
*''[[LEGO Star Wars: A New Hope]]'' ([[LEGO]] adaptation of the story)
*[[LEGO Star Wars: A New Hope (Scholastic)|''LEGO Star Wars: A New Hope'']] (A second LEGO adaptation of the story)

==Real-world==
*[[Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope (soundtrack)|''Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope'']] (soundtrack)
